milestones.label: after-batch-A-complete
milestones.summarySection:
## Status: Batch A complete (P0 quick wins shipped)

**Landed:** PR 1 corpus-path wiring fix (4 LOC delta), PR 2 .claude/settings.local.json rewrite (-31 LOC). Lane-ablation harness now runnable; advisor brief now renders as single-array hook entry. Both P0 blockers from iter-7 F33 + iter-9/10 F51 closed. Total LOC delta so far: -27 (fix-by-deletion). Roadmap critical path remaining: PR 3 → PR 4 → PR 5 → PR 9 (~21h).

memoryContinuity.nextAction: Begin PR 3 promotion subsystem DELETE sweep
memoryContinuity.decisionLog: Batch A merged in either order (no shared files); reverse-of-merge-order rollback applies

**Landed:** Batch A (PR 1+2) + PR 3 promotion subsystem DELETE sweep (-1311 LOC: 1116 code + 195 docs across 11 code files + 12 doc files; iter-13 F37-CLOSURE Option A actuated; iter-14 cross-packet preflight zero-importer assertion held), PR 4 state-vocabulary unification (V1-V5 collapsed to canonical 8-state TrustState; 4 surfaces converged: code_graph_status + code_graph_context + code_graph_query + startup-brief), PR 5 instrumentation namespace scaffold (+150 LOC; 14 canonical metrics live: 6 graph + 5 advisor + 3 freshness + 0 promotion; cardinality bound 8960 series; SPECKIT_METRICS_ENABLED canary at 100% after 24h+24h ramp), PR 6 prompt-cache invalidation listener (+5 LOC; iter-17 F81 patch landed; race closed), PR 7 settings-driven-invocation-parity test (+150 LOC; iter-11 F56 skeleton actualized; Claude-only). Total LOC delta so far: ~-1003 (still net deletion). Roadmap remaining: Batch C bench fan-out (PR 8 + 9 + 10).
